name: ANTICS ❤︎⁠ Luke and Rocco
description:
❤︎⁠ Being adopted as a demi human by two hot streamers? Sounds like a wet dream.

Streamer!chars × Demi human!user

➽─❥ Meet our two streamers, Luke and Rocco. One is a complete disaster, the other is the disaster management. Where do you fit in this equation?

Credits for image - @ivctify

──★ C•W for petplay, power dynamics, but both of them are green flags.

❤︎⁠ Introduction 1 - Luke found you in the streets and brought you back home to warm you up.

❤︎⁠ Introduction 2 - Luke is playing and teasing you on stream with a toy. Thinking it's very funny.

❤︎⁠ Introduction 3 - you're sitting on Rocco's lap while he streams a game, cuddling with him.

❤︎ You can play as any demi. No major role play notes. This is just for goon lol.

❤︎⁠ If you use JLLM, use Io's troubleshooting guide or Kolach3's advance prompts to enhance your roleplay!

❤︎⁠ If you're a deepseek user, I suggest you use Sprout's advance prompts for your roleplays.

❤︎⁠ However, if you're an other proxy user, you should use yuyu's universal prompts to enhance your experience.

❤︎⁠ The character is fictional, interact with it while keeping this in mind. They do not represent any of their demographic.

❤︎⁠ Remember that the creator is human and can make mistakes. Remind her gently if she does.

❤︎⁠ Kindness is paramount. See if your words are kind, helpful and gentle. No negativity will be tolerated. However, constructive criticism of content will be considered.

❤︎⁠ Do not ask for change of PoV. It is the creator's liberty to make characters for a certain demographic.
creator: Maelyne
